case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BALDOVINO, TERESITA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-16-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-20-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BALDOVINO, TERESITA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-16-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL BALANCE PAID IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALDOVINO, TERESITA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALDOVINO, TERESITA $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,940.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDNT DID NOT FOLLOW THROUGH WITH THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BALDOVINO, TERESITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION FILED, UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT.
PREJ. PYMTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100/MO. BEG. ON 12/16/04 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PYMT IS
MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
